dialogue: Another system saved. Commander Reese, proceed.
Our counterattack begins now. Field agents will circle the enemy base and disrupt their electronics.
Yes. They will expect us to overcommit.
A controlled risk. Remember the algorithm: the missile follows the cheapest path, not the one that looks dramatic.
*the first reports are good, almost too good*
Enemy systems are flickering. Our agents are inside the perimeter.
This is the point where the trap closes.
Incoming strike on the base. End distance: {endDistance}.
Then we make their cheapest path expensive.
